subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-08 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: By God, He granteth victory unto whomsoever He willeth. In conflicts such as these there can be no victor; in truth, all are vanquished. These two armies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: والله یؤتی النصر لمن یشاء.  در اینگونه محاربات غالبی نیست در میان، فی الحقیقه کل مغلوبند.  این دو کشتی
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
